body_preview: Extend crash diagnostic capture to cover harness startup failures and context loading failures — two paths that caused silent crashes during Days 100-102 with zero diagnostic visibility. Why this matters: The crash reporter (stash_diagnostic_error / take_diagnostic_error in state.rs) exists but is only called from state init failure in src/lib.rs line ~1032.
title: Wire crash reporter into harness startup and context loading failure paths
